archetype: 2 (Performance Pro) / Dark Mode Quick Commerce Adaption

rules.h1_max: text-3xl sm:text-4xl (Quick Commerce needs compact, scannable headings rather than giant editorial ones)
rules.body_base: text-sm md:text-base (dense e-commerce needs smaller default to fit more products)

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Tight gap-3 or gap-4 for e-commerce products, generous p-6 for admin dashboard panels
spacing_and_layout.card_radius: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl for modern app feel. Admin can use rounded-lg

components.cards: Subtle border (border-border/40), no heavy shadows in dark mode. Surface bg-[#18181B]
components.buttons: Primary buttons #22C55E background with dark text #000000 for high contrast. Use rounded-lg or rounded-full for consumer app, rounded-md for admin.
components.inputs: Shadcn default dark mode customized with focus:ring-primary. Dark bg.
components.navigation: Bottom nav bar for mobile customer app. Fixed sidebar for admin dashboard.
components.badges: Use soft green tinted bg (bg-green-500/20 text-green-400) for delivery tags or in-stock markers.

features: Persistent 'Delivery in 30 Minutes' banner/badge on Home, Product, Cart, and Checkout pages
Demo OTP displayed on screen for testing during login/signup

image_urls.description: baskets with fruits - Good for home top banner
delivery cyclist - Use for checkout or delivery tracking

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use .js extensions for React components, NOT .tsx.
Set up Tailwind CSS with dark mode as default.
Customer App UI: Mimic Blinkit with a mobile-first responsive layout (use bottom navigation on mobile, dense product grids).
Admin UI: Use modern cards, professional Shadcn tables, dark green theme accents, and a fixed sidebar.
Ensure 'Delivery in 30 Minutes' is persistently visible across Home, Product, Cart, and Checkout pages.
Implement demo OTP logic (e.g., render the OTP visible on the UI or in a toast) for auth testing.
Create two default admin users (Mobile 8381869505/admin123 and 8858351010/admin123) in the seeding script.
Only support Cash on Delivery (COD) in the checkout flow. No payment gateway integration required.
Seed products with auto-generated placeholder images or use the unsplash URLs provided in 'media' for corresponding categories.
CRITICAL: Apply 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, links, forms).
